title: NVR Q4 Earnings & Revenues to Gain From Solid Housing Demand
text: NVR's fourth-quarter 2021 earnings and revenues are likely to have increased, courtesy of strong housing market fundamentals.

title: Who's Ready For Some 'Bob The Builder' Bargains?
text: We all know the homebuilder sector is cyclical, yet shares remain cheap, most trading at single-digit multiples.

title: Now Could Be the Perfect Time to Buy These Stocks
text: One of our experts explains why he likes homebuilders' stocks.

title: Build Value With NVR
text: NVR has a demonstrable history of growing revenue and profits and of improving returns on invested capital. The company operates in an industry whose secular trends suggest that the present housing boom has a strong fundamental basis.
